noharm: The web does not cause harm to society
community: The web supports healthy community and debate
allpeople: The web is for all people
privacy: The web is secure and respects people's privacy
expression: The web enables freedom of expression
verify: The web makes it possible to verify information
control: The web enhances individuals' control and power
sustainable: The web is an environmentally sustainable platform
multi: The web is multi-browser, multi-OS, and multi-device
render: The web can be consumed in any way that people choose
